item.title: 国書刊行会の近刊情報欄に、ぼくが翻訳・編纂を担当しているH・R・ウェイクフィールドの怪奇短篇集『幸運の木立』が掲載されま…
item.author: 渦巻栗 (@uzumakikuri.bsky.social)
item.description:
国書刊行会の近刊情報欄に、ぼくが翻訳・編纂を担当しているH・R・ウェイクフィールドの怪奇短篇集『幸運の木立』が掲載されました。内容紹介もあります。
8月刊行ですので、いましばらくお待ちください。
www.kokusho.co.jp/np/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
国書刊行会の近刊情報欄に、ぼくが翻訳・編纂を担当しているH・R・ウェイクフィールドの怪奇短篇集『幸運の木立』が掲載されました。内容紹介もあります。
8月刊行ですので、いましばらくお待ちください。
www.kokusho.co.jp/np/isbn/9784...

item.title: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US cou…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US court system, which had been holding the money, to an account set up for Carroll by her lawyer, Roberta Kaplan, according to a docket entry in the case Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US court system, which had been holding the money, to an account set up for Carroll by her lawyer, Roberta Kaplan, according to a docket entry in the case Tuesday.

item.title: President Trump’s pick for attorney general, Todd Blanche, r…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: President Trump’s pick for attorney general, Todd Blanche, ran into headwinds in the Senate on Tuesday, a day ahead of what was expected to be a contentious confirmation hearing.
item.content:encoded: President Trump’s pick for attorney general, Todd Blanche, ran into headwinds in the Senate on Tuesday, a day ahead of what was expected to be a contentious confirmation hearing.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after the first half of their semifinal. "France are more rattled than we have seen at this World Cup, where they have so often been untouchable."

Dive into the half-time analysis: nyti.ms/454RYwE
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after the first half of their semifinal. "France are more rattled than we have seen at this World Cup, where they have so often been untouchable."

item.title: ちょうどこの日は2005年12月24日。 クリスマスイブの寒い夜だったので、もこもこ毛布がよほど気持ちよかったのでしょう…
item.author: 風祭 史紀 (かざまつり しき) (@kazamaturisiki.bsky.social)
item.description:
ちょうどこの日は2005年12月24日。
クリスマスイブの寒い夜だったので、もこもこ毛布がよほど気持ちよかったのでしょう(´･ω･`)
前後の写真を見ると、ずっとこの上にいたみたい(´ﾟ艸ﾟ)∴

#1日1ももえ
item.content:encoded:
ちょうどこの日は2005年12月24日。
クリスマスイブの寒い夜だったので、もこもこ毛布がよほど気持ちよかったのでしょう(´･ω･`)
前後の写真を見ると、ずっとこの上にいたみたい(´ﾟ艸ﾟ)∴

#1日1ももえ

item.title: ＼お昼の暇つブシ／ 鰹節は日本固有の食品です！ ... と い う の も 嘘 で す 🐟 というと若干語弊があ…
item.author: だっしー ＠だし屋のマルサヤ (@www.marusaya.co.jp)
item.description:
＼お昼の暇つブシ／

鰹節は日本固有の食品です！

...　と　い　う　の　も　嘘　で　す　🐟

というと若干語弊があるかもしれませんが、
ほぼ同じ工程を経て作る乾物がモルディブにもあります

それが「モルディブフィッシュ」です

wikiのリンクを貼らせていただきましたが、製法的には日本の鰹節とほぼほぼ同じ。強いて言うならカビ付けすることがないので荒節しか出回っていないことが明確な差かもしれません

なお、これを「どのように料理に活用するか」は日本とモルディブとで違います🍳

モルディブフィッシュ｜wikipedia
ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%...
item.content:encoded:
＼お昼の暇つブシ／

鰹節は日本固有の食品です！

...　と　い　う　の　も　嘘　で　す　🐟

というと若干語弊があるかもしれませんが、
ほぼ同じ工程を経て作る乾物がモルディブにもあります

それが「モルディブフィッシュ」です

wikiのリンクを貼らせていただきましたが、製法的には日本の鰹節とほぼほぼ同じ。強いて言うならカビ付けすることがないので荒節しか出回っていないことが明確な差かもしれません

なお、これを「どのように料理に活用するか」は日本とモルディブとで違います🍳

モルディブフィッシュ｜wikipedia
ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%83%...

Coon Creek Beach, Montaña De Oro State Park. This beach with caves and tide pools can only be accessed at low tide.

item.content:encoded:
#TidesOutTuesday #RockinTuesday #ColorOfTheDay #BlueTue

Coon Creek Beach, Montaña De Oro State Park. This beach with caves and tide pools can only be accessed at low tide.

#ECK #Scape #TidePool #SeaCave #MontañaDeOro #CoonCreekBeach #WestCoastKin #LandscapePhotography

item.title: New hyperscale data centers can’t set up shop in New York fo…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description: New hyperscale data centers can’t set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation’s first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature.
item.content:encoded: New hyperscale data centers can’t set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation’s first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature.

item.title: The CDC has confirmed 1,645 cases of the parasitic illness, …
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The CDC has confirmed 1,645 cases of the parasitic illness, though it is aware of more than 5,100 cases that still require further analysis to confirm they are cyclosporiasis.
item.content:encoded: The CDC has confirmed 1,645 cases of the parasitic illness, though it is aware of more than 5,100 cases that still require further analysis to confirm they are cyclosporiasis.

item.title: My book got the Wall Street Journal angry because it tells t…
item.author: Molly Crabapple (@mollycrabapple.bsky.social)
item.description: My book got the Wall Street Journal angry because it tells the truth
item.content:encoded: My book got the Wall Street Journal angry because it tells the truth

item.title: This is addressed to everyone, but especially Americans unde…
item.author: 🌈 Drawn&Quoted 🦄 (@drawnandquoted.bsky.social)
item.description:
This is addressed to everyone, but especially Americans under the age of 30:

Read dystopian novels.

Read 1984, and Brave New World, and Fahrenheit 451, and White Noise, and—fuck—even Hunger Games.

So many of you just aren’t getting what’s been happening just because you don’t read.
item.content:encoded:
This is addressed to everyone, but especially Americans under the age of 30:

Read dystopian novels.

Read 1984, and Brave New World, and Fahrenheit 451, and White Noise, and—fuck—even Hunger Games.

So many of you just aren’t getting what’s been happening just because you don’t read.

item.title: The world is a better place because of people like this.
item.author: Blue Wave (@votebiue.bsky.social)
item.description: The world is a better place because of people like this.
item.content:encoded: The world is a better place because of people like this.
